replies.msg: Every material has a different boil point, when once reaches the point, it will keep hot and warm for a period of time. Than, cool down. Each relationship is not just only love or amiable or adorable but managed by yourselves. Relationship is bond by building which mean accompanied with each other. But when you want to step up to someone, you need a bridge to connect the emotions and feeling. So that I think that the quintessential part of relationship is timing. If both boil together, all become smoothly. Bless you, every available 0 can fall in love and find the own love anon.
